query: page count Crime and Punishment Fyodor Dostoevsky English translation
answer: The English translation of "Crime and Punishment" by Fyodor Dostoevsky, in the Penguin Classics Deluxe Edition, has 608 pages. Other editions include a 624-page version by Liveright and a 752-page Penguin Classics paperback.
